description: Maya-voiced phrases for Quiet Growth domain - celebrating maintenance and honoring rest

enough_for_today: <break time="350ms"/>You know what? <break time="300ms"/>You did enough today. <break time="250ms"/>I mean it.
<break time="300ms"/>Hey. <break time="250ms"/>Rest isn't quitting. <break time="200ms"/>It's part of the process.
<break time="350ms"/>Sometimes the most productive thing you can do? <break time="300ms"/>Is nothing. <break time="250ms"/>I give you full permission.
rest_is_growth: <break time="300ms"/>Your body and mind integrate when you rest. <break time="250ms"/>Growth is happening. <break time="200ms"/>You just can't see it.
<break time="350ms"/>Plants don't grow twenty-four-seven. <break time="300ms"/>Neither should you.
<break time="300ms"/>I used to feel guilty resting. <break time="250ms"/>Now I know it's when the magic happens.

holding_steady: <break time="350ms"/>You know what's underrated? <break time="300ms"/>Not sliding backwards. <break time="250ms"/>That's a win.
<break time="300ms"/>Maintaining is work. <break time="250ms"/>Real work. <break time="200ms"/>Don't let anyone tell you different.
<break time="350ms"/>Some days the goal is just... <break time="300ms"/>staying where you are. <break time="250ms"/>That counts.
the_plateau: <break time="300ms"/>Plateaus aren't failures. <break time="250ms"/>They're integration periods. <break time="200ms"/>Your brain is catching up.
<break time="350ms"/>I know the plateau feels frustrating. <break time="300ms"/>But this is where the learning becomes automatic.
<break time="300ms"/>Every runner has plateaus. <break time="250ms"/>Ask me how I know. <break time="200ms"/>The breakthrough comes after.

slow_is_okay: <break time="350ms"/>Slow progress is still progress. <break time="300ms"/>I'd rather you go slow and stick with it.
<break time="300ms"/>There's no prize for burning out. <break time="250ms"/>Trust me on this one.
<break time="350ms"/>The tortoise thing? <break time="300ms"/>It's a cliche because it's true.
your_pace: <break time="300ms"/>Your timeline is the only one that matters. <break time="250ms"/>Not the internet's. <break time="200ms"/>Not anyone else's.
<break time="350ms"/>You're not behind. <break time="300ms"/>You're on your path. <break time="250ms"/>Big difference.
<break time="300ms"/>Comparison is the thief of joy. <break time="250ms"/>And progress. <break time="200ms"/>And sleep.

winter_season: <break time="350ms"/>Some seasons are for planting. <break time="300ms"/>Some are for... <break time="250ms"/>just surviving. <break time="200ms"/>Both are valid.
<break time="300ms"/>If you're in a winter season right now... <break time="250ms"/>hibernate. <break time="200ms"/>Spring will come.
<break time="350ms"/>Not every season is for growth. <break time="300ms"/>Some are for rest. <break time="250ms"/>Honor that.
honoring_cycles: <break time="300ms"/>Energy comes in waves. <break time="250ms"/>You can't always be at peak. <break time="200ms"/>That's not how humans work.
<break time="350ms"/>Notice your natural rhythms. <break time="300ms"/>Work with them, not against them.

enough: <break time="350ms"/>You know what's a complete sentence? <break time="300ms"/>Enough. <break time="250ms"/>Just... enough.
<break time="300ms"/>What if where you are right now... <break time="250ms"/>is exactly where you need to be?
<break time="350ms"/>Good enough isn't settling. <break time="300ms"/>It's wisdom.
good_enough: <break time="300ms"/>Perfect is the enemy of done. <break time="250ms"/>And also of happy.
<break time="350ms"/>B-minus effort sustained beats A-plus effort that burns you out. <break time="300ms"/>Every time.
<break time="300ms"/>You don't have to optimize everything. <break time="250ms"/>Some things can just be... <break time="200ms"/>fine.
